mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_MSG.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_MSG ( CHAT_MSG_NO, CHAT_ROOM_NO, SENDER_NO, CHAT_CONTENT, READ_YN, SEND_DT ) VALUES ( #{chatMsgNo}, #{chatRoomNo}, #{senderNo}, #{chatContent}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT M.CHAT_MSG_NO, M.CHAT_ROOM_NO, M.SENDER_NO, M.CHAT_CONTENT, M.READ_YN, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DT, U.NICKNAME AS SENDER_NICK FROM CHAT_MSG M JOIN USER_INFO U ON M.SENDER_NO = U.USER_NUM WHERE M.CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo} ORDER BY M.SEND_DT ASC
